title: Bee Removal in Great Neck, NY | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Great Neck, Long Island. Safe, effective hive removal for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 service!
intro: When bees establish hives around your Great Neck property, you need fast and safe removal from licensed professionals. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bee removal services throughout Great Neck, protecting your family, pets, and neighbors from dangerous stings. Our experienced technicians use humane methods to relocate bee colonies while ensuring your property is completely secure.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Great Neck homeowners and businesses for years with reliable, same-day bee removal services. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of Long Island properties and provide guaranteed results at competitive rates of $350-$550.
localContext: Great Neck's beautiful tree-lined streets, historic estates, and waterfront properties near Kings Point and Saddle Rock provide ideal nesting sites for honeybees and carpenter bees. From the grand homes along Middle Neck Road to the bustling Village Green area, our team responds quickly to protect Great Neck residents from bee infestations in attics, eaves, chimneys, and landscaping.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a bee hive from my Great Neck home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day bee removal service throughout Great Neck and surrounding Long Island communities. Our team typically arrives within 2-4 hours for emergency situations and can safely remove most hives in a single visit.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 bee removal service?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive bee removal service includes a thorough inspection, safe removal of the hive and bees, treatment of the affected area to prevent returns, cleanup of honeycomb and debris, and sealing of entry points. The final price depends on hive size, location accessibility, and extent of infestation.

faqs.question: Do you use safe methods for bee removal in residential areas?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We prioritize the safety of your family, pets, and neighbors by using proven, eco-friendly techniques. Whenever possible, we relocate bees humanely to preserve these important pollinators while completely eliminating the threat to your Great Neck property.

faqs.question: Are bee removal services covered by homeowners insurance in Great Neck?
faqs.answer: Some homeowners insurance policies in New York cover bee removal, especially if the hive has caused structural damage. We provide detailed invoices and documentation to help you file claims with your insurance company. Contact us to discuss your specific situation and coverage options.
